debug_info.goal:
F : Type
inst✝¹ : Field F
inst✝ : DecidableEq F
⊢ ∀ (cl : Circuit F F) (cr : Circuit F (ℕ × F)) (G : List (Entry F (ℕ × F))),
    wf G cl cr → List.Forall (fun entry => entry.l = (Exp.c entry.r.2).eval) G → cl ≈ Clap.Dedup.dedup F inst✝ F cr

  case is_zero e kl kr _ ih =>
    apply Sim.is_zero
    apply ih

by
  intros cl cr G h_wf h_G
  let P := fun (set : List (Exp F Nat)) => ∀ (eR : Exp F (Nat × F)), (to_nat eR) ∈ set → Exp.eval (to_var eR) = 0
  have : ∀ cl cr G n set, wf G cl cr → List.Forall (fun entry => entry.l = Exp.eval entry.r.2) G → P set → cl ≈ dedup_ cr n set := by
    induction 1 generalizing n set <;> intros h_G h_P <;> simp [dedup_]
    · apply Equiv.refl
    · rename_i eL eR cl cr h_e h_wf ih
      have h_var : eL = to_var eR := by
        clear ih h_P h_wf
        induction h_e <;> simp [to_var, *]
        · rename_i entry h_mem; exact (h_G.left h_mem)
      split
      · rename_i h_in
        transitivity cl; · apply Equiv.eq0; · rwa [h_var, h_P eR h_in]; · apply Equiv.refl
        · apply ih h_G h_P
      · apply Equiv.eq0
        · rwa [h_var]
        · apply ih h_G
          intro e h_in; simp at h_in; cases h_in
          · rename_i h_eq; subst h_eq
            clear ih h_wf
            induction h_e <;> simp [to_nat, to_var, *]
            · rename_i entry h_mem; exact (h_G.left h_mem)
          · exact h_P _ ‹_›
    · apply Equiv.lam; intro x
      apply ih; · simp [h_G]
      · intro eR h_in; exact h_P eR h_in
    · apply Equiv.share
      · clear ih h_wf h_P; induction h_e <;> simp [to_var, *]
        · rename_i entry h_mem; exact (h_G.left h_mem)
      · intro x; apply ih; · simp [h_G]
        · intro eR h_in; exact h_P eR h_in
    · apply Equiv.is_zero
      · clear ih h_wf h_P; induction h_e <;> simp [to_var, *]
        · rename_i entry h_mem; exact (h_G.left h_mem)
      · intro x; apply ih; · simp [h_G]
        · intro eR h_in; exact h_P eR h_in
  apply this _ _ _ 0 [] h_wf h_G; simp [P]

  intros cl cr G hwf hG
  induction hwf generalizing n set
  case nil => simp [dedup, dedup_]
  case eq0 e cl cr hwf ih =>
    simp [dedup, dedup_]; split
    · rw [ih]; apply eq0_redundant; assumption
    · apply eq0_equiv; apply ih; assumption
  case lam kl kr hwf ih =>
    simp [dedup, dedup_]; apply lam_equiv; intro x; apply ih; simp [hG]
  case share e kl kr hwf ih =>
    simp [dedup, dedup_]; apply share_equiv; intro x; apply ih; simp [hG]
  case is_zero e kl kr hwf ih =>
    simp [dedup, dedup_]; apply is_zero_equiv; intro x; apply ih; simp [hG]

  intro h_wf h_G
  unfold dedup
  induction h_wf generalizing G n set
  case nil => exact Simulation.nil
  case eq0 ih =>
    simp [dedup_]
    split
    · apply Simulation.eq0_left; · assumption; · apply ih; assumption; assumption
    · apply Simulation.eq0; apply ih; assumption; assumption
